name: MILP-Evo: Closed-Loop Fully Automatic Design of MILP Solvers
summary: arXiv:2607.18252v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine learning methods have shown that data-driven policies can accelerate mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) solvers, but many such approache...
description: arXiv:2607.18252v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine learning methods have shown that data-driven policies can accelerate mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) solvers, but many such approaches remain difficult to inspect, adapt, and deploy because the learned policy is represented as an external predictor or other opaque model. By contrast, explicit solver logic is easier to understand an...
author: Jinbiao Nie, Kewei Feng, Xiaoyuan Zhang, Shan Yin, Zizhuo Wang, Bin Dong
